segments.text: Bring Aaron and his sons, their garments, the anointing oil, the bull for the sin offering, the two rams and the basket containing bread made without yeast,
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: and gather the entire assembly at the entrance to the tent of meeting.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Bring Aaron and his sons, their garments, the anointing oil, the bull for the sin offering, the two rams and the basket containing bread made without yeast,
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: and gather the entire assembly at the entrance to the tent of meeting.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: and gather the entire assembly at the entrance to the tent of meeting.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: Moses did as the Lord commanded him, and the assembly gathered at the entrance to the tent of meeting.
This is what the Lord has commanded to be done.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Moses then said to Aaron and his sons,
Cook the meat at the entrance to the tent of meeting and eat it there with the bread from the basket of ordination offerings, as I was commanded: 'Aaron and his sons are to eat it.'
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Then burn up the rest of the meat and the bread.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: Do not leave the entrance to the tent of meeting for seven days, until the days of your ordination are completed, for your ordination will last seven days.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: What has been done today was commanded by the Lord to make atonement for you.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: You must stay at the entrance to the tent of meeting day and night for seven days and do what the Lord requires, so you will not die; for that is what I have been commanded.
segments.speaker: Moses

segments.text: So Aaron and his sons did everything the Lord commanded through Moses.
